title: Bendy and the Ink Machine
description: Bendy and the Ink Machine - Fully Playable Minecraft Map. 1:1 Fanmade Recreation of the iconic indie horror game!
body:
This package includes a **non-official** playable recreation of _Bendy and the Ink Machine_ with a chapter-by-chapter release.


_This project is fan-made and not affiliated with or endorsed by Joey Drew Studios._

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_TfLU-HUkB8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Map Information](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/e7hg1uE0OeJm.png?o=1)
![logo_and_disclaimer](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/jMuPqYz1ly37.png?o=1)
⚡ NO MODS. NO OPTIFINE. NO SETUP. ⚡

Just download, drag into your saves folder, and play. The hand-drawn art style and core shaders load automatically.

![dreams come true](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/h6c7aibJfnFY.png?o=1)

Step into the shoes of Henry as he revisits the old demons of his past, traveling deep into the abandoned workshop of Joey Drew Studios - a place steeped in mystery and madness.

FEATURES & COOL STATS:

- Perfect 1:1 remake of Bendy and the Ink Machine in Vanilla Minecraft 1.21.10!
- 1559 Commands optimized for smooth performance!
- Fabulous Graphics to enhance the experience!
- Map automatically resets upon completion!
- Chapter One somehow made in under two weeks!

![A Dark Animation Studio](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/AYkPwDregX5D.png?o=1)

A deeply atmospheric and spine-tingling experience with secrets hiding behind the studio's drawn walls and scribbled doors. Traverse deep into the shadows, where the monsters of the past dwell and our creations rise.

![A Nightmarish Mystery](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/XGWoQOhsvAZF.png?o=1)

Friends and foes will help or hinder your path as you unravel the great mystery of the studio. Trust no one, fear the machine. Insanity is the name of the game down here.

![A Labyrinth of Horrors](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/ITbJALyq2MUT.png?o=1)

The creatures of the Dark Puddles surround you as you are faced with puzzling obstacles. You're never alone. You're never safe. Your animated nightmares are just beginning.

**Will you be able to escape this recreation of Bendy and the Ink Machine, or will you become part of its eerie legacy?**
